explanationTarget: Quvib o‘tish niyatingizni signal yoki chiroq chaqnashi bilan bildirishingiz mumkin. Shuningdek, boshqa yo‘l ishtirokchilarini ogohlantirish va xavflardan xabardor qilish uchun signal yoki chiroq chaqnashidan foydalanishingiz mumkin. Aniq xavfli vaziyat bo‘lmasa, signalni chaqirish belgisi sifatida ishlatishga ruxsat berilmaydi.

questionTextSource: For which purposes is a horn allowed to be used in built-up areas?
explanationSource: In built-up areas, the horn may only be used by the driver as a warning signal in the event of a dangerous situation. As it would be an unnecessary noise nuisance, the use of the horn for greeting purposes or to indicate that you want to overtake, is inadmissible in built-up areas. Only outside of built-up areas, you may use the horn or flash light to announce an overtaking process.
answerBSource: As an overtaking signal
questionTextTarget: Aholi yashash hududlarida signal qaysi maqsadlarda ishlatilishi mumkin?
explanationTarget: Aholi yashash hududlarida haydovchi signalni faqat xavfli vaziyatda ogohlantiruvchi signal sifatida ishlatishi mumkin. Salomlashish uchun yoki quvib o‘tmoqchi ekanini bildirish uchun signal ishlatish bu hududlarda keraksiz shovqin bo‘lgani sabab ruxsat etilmaydi. Faqat aholi yashash hududidan tashqarida quvib o‘tishni signal yoki chiroq chaqnashi bilan bildirish mumkin.

questionTextSource: What do you do in case of a breakdown in a tunnel?
explanationSource: In the tunnel, the alternatives for subsequent traffic are low. Therefore, if possible, stop in one of the marked emergency bays in the event of a breakdown. Switch on the hazard light on your car and switch off the engine due to the high risk of poisoning by exhaust gases in the tunnel.
answerASource: Switch on the hazard warning lights
answerBSource: If possible, park the vehicle in an emergency bay
answerCSource: Let the engine run by way of precaution
questionTextTarget: Tunnelda buzilish yuz bersa nima qilasiz?
explanationTarget: Tunnelda ortdan kelayotgan transport uchun muqobil harakat imkoniyatlari kam. Shuning uchun buzilish yuz bersa, imkon bo‘lsa, belgilangan favqulodda to‘xtash joylaridan birida to‘xtang. Avtomobilingizning avariya chiroqlarini yoqing va tunnelda chiqindi gazlaridan zaharlanish xavfi yuqori bo‘lgani sabab dvigatelni o‘chiring.
answerBTarget: Imkon bo‘lsa, transport vositasini favqulodda to‘xtash joyiga qo‘yaman
answerCTarget: Ehtiyot chorasi sifatida dvigatelni ishlatib qo‘yaman

questionTextSource: You are driving in a tunnel and approach the end of a traffic jam. What do you do?
explanationSource: If you recognize a traffic jam in front of you, it is important to immediately press the hazard light to warn the drivers behind you of the coming situation. This way, they can react better to the situation. During traffic jams, the car driver should stop the engine but not leave the car. Turning in the tunnel is not allowed.
answerASource: Switch on the hazard warning lights
answerBSource: Make a U-turn and leave the tunnel
answerCSource: At the end of the traffic jam, switch off the engine and leave the vehicle
questionTextTarget: Siz tunnelda ketyapsiz va tirbandlik oxiriga yaqinlashyapsiz. Nima qilasiz?
explanationTarget: Oldinda tirbandlikni sezsangiz, ortingizdagi haydovchilarni yaqinlashayotgan vaziyatdan ogohlantirish uchun darhol avariya chiroqlarini yoqish muhim. Shunda ular vaziyatga yaxshiroq javob bera oladi. Tirbandlik paytida haydovchi dvigatelni o‘chirishi, lekin avtomobilni tark etmasligi kerak. Tunnelda qayrilib burilish taqiqlanadi.
answerCTarget: Tirbandlik oxirida dvigatelni o‘chirib, transport vositasini tark etaman

questionTextSource: What must you remember concerning the lighting equipment of your vehicle?
explanationSource: The car driver must properly install the lighting equipment on the vehicle. In addition to full functionality, the lighting must also be clean, so that other drivers see you in bad weather or in a tunnel.
answerBSource: It must be clean
answerCSource: It must be in operating condition
questionTextTarget: Transport vositangizning yoritish uskunalari haqida nimani yodda tutishingiz kerak?
explanationTarget: Avtomobil haydovchisi transport vositasidagi yoritish uskunalarini to‘g‘ri o‘rnatilgan holatda saqlashi kerak. To‘liq ishlashidan tashqari, yoritish uskunalari toza ham bo‘lishi kerak, shunda boshqa haydovchilar yomon ob-havoda yoki tunnelda sizni ko‘ra oladi.

questionTextSource: What can cause even dipped headlights to dazzle oncoming traffic?
explanationSource: Head lamps set too high, wrongly installed bulbs, or loading a car the wrong way can dazzle oncoming traffic as well as the car driver driving in front. Back-heavy loads change the radius of the light cone of the low beam; he goes upwards and leads to dangerous glares. You should know the headlamp beam height control on your car.
answerBSource: Incorrectly inserted bulbs
questionTextTarget: Qisqa faralar ham qarshidan kelayotgan transportni ko‘r qilishi nimadan bo‘lishi mumkin?
explanationTarget: Juda baland sozlangan faralar, noto‘g‘ri o‘rnatilgan lampalar yoki avtomobilni noto‘g‘ri yuklash qarshidan kelayotgan transportni ham, oldinda ketayotgan haydovchini ham ko‘r qilishi mumkin. Orqa qismi og‘ir yuklangan avtomobil qisqa faraning yorug‘lik konusi yo‘nalishini o‘zgartiradi; u yuqoriga ko‘tarilib, xavfli ko‘r qiluvchi yorug‘likka olib keladi. Avtomobilingizdagi fara balandligini sozlash moslamasini bilishingiz kerak.

questionTextSource: How is it possible to prevent oncoming traffic being dazzled by the dipped headlights?
explanationSource: In order not to dazzle oncoming traffic, you should pay attention to how your low beam is adjusted and that it is adjusted after repairs to the headlights or after new installations. If you have to change the bulbs, only use approved bulbs.
answerASource: The headlight range can be adjusted depending on the load carried by the vehicle
answerBSource: Only permissible light bulbs may be used in each of the headlights
answerCSource: The headlight setting should be checked after every repair
questionTextTarget: Qisqa faralar bilan qarshidan kelayotgan transportni ko‘r qilishning oldini qanday olish mumkin?
explanationTarget: Qarshidan kelayotgan transportni ko‘r qilmaslik uchun qisqa faralaringiz qanday sozlanganiga va faralar ta’mirlangandan yoki yangidan o‘rnatilgandan keyin qayta sozlanganiga e’tibor bering. Lampalarni almashtirishingiz kerak bo‘lsa, faqat ruxsat etilgan lampalardan foydalaning.
answerATarget: Transport vositasi yukiga qarab fara yorug‘lik masofasini sozlash mumkin
answerBTarget: Har bir farada faqat ruxsat etilgan lampalardan foydalanish mumkin
answerCTarget: Har bir ta’mirdan keyin fara sozlamasi tekshirilishi kerak

questionTextSource: A railway employee is waving a white-red-white flag at a level crossing. What does this mean?
explanationSource: If a railroad employee waves a white-red-white flag in front of a railroad crossing, you must wait at a safe distance before the crossing. Waving the flag means that the railroad crossing is blocked until the train has passed and the railroad employee stops the blockage.
answerASource: You must wait in front of the level crossing
answerBSource: You may cross the rails carefully
answerCSource: The flag is only meant for the train driver
questionTextTarget: Temiryo‘l kesishmasida temiryo‘l xodimi oq-qizil-oq bayroqni silkityapti. Bu nimani bildiradi?
explanationTarget: Agar temiryo‘l xodimi temiryo‘l kesishmasi oldida oq-qizil-oq bayroqni silkitsa, kesishmadan oldin xavfsiz masofada kutishingiz kerak. Bayroqni silkitish poyezd o‘tib ketguncha va temiryo‘l xodimi to‘sishni tugatguncha temiryo‘l kesishmasi yopiq ekanini bildiradi.
answerBTarget: Relslarni ehtiyotkorlik bilan kesib o‘tishingiz mumkin
answerCTarget: Bayroq faqat poyezd haydovchisi uchun mo‘ljallangan

questionTextSource: When must you wait at a level crossing?
explanationSource: All road users are required to stop and wait immediately before a level crossing in the following situations: when the signal system's red flashing light comes on, when the barriers start to lower, when the barriers are closed, when a staff member waves a white-red-white flag , You must wait until the blockage is released again.
answerASource: When a flashing red light comes on
answerBSource: When the barriers are being lowered
answerCSource: When a railway employee is waving a white-red-white flag
questionTextTarget: Temiryo‘l kesishmasida qachon kutishingiz kerak?
explanationTarget: Barcha yo‘l harakati ishtirokchilari quyidagi vaziyatlarda temiryo‘l kesishmasidan oldin darhol to‘xtab kutishi shart: signal tizimining qizil miltillovchi chirog‘i yonganda, shlagbaumlar tushishni boshlaganda, shlagbaumlar yopiq bo‘lganda, xodim oq-qizil-oq bayroqni silkiganda. To‘sish yana olib tashlanguncha kutishingiz kerak.

questionTextSource: You are approaching a level crossing with half barriers and flashing lights. The red light is flashing but the barrier is still open. What do you do?
explanationSource: When the red flashing light of a barrier system lights up before rail traffic, all road users must stop in front of the diagonal cross. Driving on is strictly prohibited even if the half barrier is still open. The barriers have fast closing times and can jam vehicles. Rail vehicles are approaching at high speeds and have a very long braking distance of several hundred meters. Therefore, they cannot react situationally to obstacles.
answerASource: Wait in front of the St. Andrew's Cross
answerBSource: Proceed as long as the half barrier is open
answerCSource: If no rail vehicle is in sight, cross the level crossing
questionTextTarget: Siz yarim shlagbaumli va miltillovchi chiroqli temiryo‘l kesishmasiga yaqinlashyapsiz. Qizil chiroq miltillayapti, lekin shlagbaum hali ochiq. Nima qilasiz?
explanationTarget: Temiryo‘l harakati oldidan shlagbaum tizimining qizil miltillovchi chirog‘i yonsa, barcha yo‘l ishtirokchilari Avliyo Andrey xochi oldida to‘xtashi kerak. Yarim shlagbaum hali ochiq bo‘lsa ham, davom etish qat’iyan taqiqlanadi. Shlagbaumlar tez yopiladi va transport vositalarini qisib qo‘yishi mumkin. Relsli transport yuqori tezlikda yaqinlashadi va bir necha yuz metrlik juda uzun tormoz yo‘liga ega. Shu sabab ular to‘siqlarga vaziyatga mos ravishda javob bera olmaydi.
answerBTarget: Yarim shlagbaum ochiq ekan, davom etaman
answerCTarget: Relsli transport ko‘rinmasa, temiryo‘l kesishmasidan o‘taman

questionTextSource: A railway employee is waving a red lamp at a level crossing. What does this mean?
explanationSource: All car drivers and other road users must wait at a safe distance before the crossing if a member of the railway staff secures a low-traffic level crossing with a red light. Waving the red light means that the tracks are inaccessible and trains have priority.
answerASource: You must wait in front of the level crossing
answerBSource: You may cross the rails carefully
answerCSource: The red lamp is of no significance for you
questionTextTarget: Temiryo‘l kesishmasida temiryo‘l xodimi qizil chiroqni silkityapti. Bu nimani bildiradi?
explanationTarget: Agar temiryo‘l xodimi kam harakatli temiryo‘l kesishmasini qizil chiroq bilan himoyalasa, barcha avtomobil haydovchilari va boshqa yo‘l ishtirokchilari kesishmadan oldin xavfsiz masofada kutishi kerak. Qizil chiroqni silkitish relslardan o‘tib bo‘lmasligini va poyezdlar ustunlikka ega ekanini bildiradi.
answerBTarget: Relslarni ehtiyotkorlik bilan kesib o‘tishingiz mumkin
answerCTarget: Qizil chiroq siz uchun ahamiyatga ega emas

questionTextSource: You are approaching a level crossing where the barriers are open. What do you do?
explanationSource: Nevertheless, as you approach a railroad crossing with the barriers open, you must reduce speed and be aware of the track. The car driver should make sure that the transition is possible without danger and that no rail vehicle is approaching. When you see that a traffic jam could occur, it is necessary to keep a distance so that no car will end up standing on the rails. Rail transport always has priority.
answerASource: Approach at moderate speed, look along the railway line
answerBSource: Wait in front of the level crossing if you would have to wait on it because of traffic congestion
answerCSource: Proceed at the same speed as road traffic always has precedence in such cases
questionTextTarget: Siz shlagbaumlari ochiq temiryo‘l kesishmasiga yaqinlashyapsiz. Nima qilasiz?
explanationTarget: Shunga qaramay, shlagbaumlari ochiq bo‘lgan temiryo‘l kesishmasiga yaqinlashayotganda tezlikni kamaytirishingiz va rels yo‘nalishiga e’tibor berishingiz kerak. Haydovchi o‘tish xavfsiz ekaniga va hech qanday relsli transport yaqinlashmayotganiga ishonch hosil qilishi kerak. Agar tirbandlik yuzaga kelishi mumkinligini ko‘rsangiz, hech bir avtomobil relslar ustida to‘xtab qolmasligi uchun masofa saqlashingiz kerak. Relsli transport har doim ustunlikka ega.
answerATarget: O‘rtacha tezlikda yaqinlashaman, temiryo‘l yo‘nalishi bo‘ylab qarayman
answerBTarget: Agar tirbandlik sabab kesishmada kutishimga to‘g‘ri kelsa, temiryo‘l kesishmasi oldida kutaman
answerCTarget: Yo‘l transporti bunday holatda har doim ustun bo‘lgani uchun xuddi shu tezlikda davom etaman
